summary: Pd-style adc~ audio device input source.
description: Audio Input owns an input stream sample clock. Direct routing to object.core.audio.output is valid only when the runtime can prove both endpoints share an audio clock domain.
runtimeBehavior: Produces audio signal channels from a runtime input endpoint. Independent input-to-output domain crossing requires object.core.audio.clock-bridge or object.core.audio.resample.
